name: myAPT - Daily Filming Alert + Daily Capture Opportunities

nodes.name: Clear Daily Capture Opportunities
nodes.notes: Clears current snapshot before writing fresh Daily Capture Opportunities rows. If import asks, select the Alerts Sheet 2 spreadsheet and the Daily Capture Opportunities tab.

nodes.name: Append Daily Capture Opportunities
nodes.notes: Appends normalized opportunity rows after Clear Daily Capture Opportunities.
